options.name: -add_markers
options.description: Adds any detected violations to the violation browser.

options.name: -clear_markers
options.description: Removes any markers added to the violation browser by the report_ccopt_cell_halo_violations command.

options.name: -file
options.description: Save a copy of the contents of the report to the specified file name

options.name: -num
options.description: Specifies the number of instances with a cell halo violation to report by name

options.name: -summary
options.description: Displays just the summary tables of cell halo violations per clock tree
